title: Jabil Unveils Findings of Global Survey on 3D Printing Technology Trends
text: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Jabil Inc. (NYSE: JBL) today announced the findings of its latest global survey of additive manufacturing decision makers, which reinforces the steady ascent of 3D printing technologies and additive materials into production environments. Since 2017, Jabil has conducted this biennial survey to trace the trajectory of additive manufacturing while identifying the most promising opportunities and lingering challenges facing decision makers. The latest survey.

title: Unleashing Jabil's Potential: How Diversification And Innovation Drive Future Growth
text: Jabil, a global manufacturing company, has diversified its operations across high-growth markets such as electric vehicles, healthcare, and renewable energy and is well-positioned to leverage growth opportunities. Despite strong financial performance and strategic positioning, Jabil faces risks, including customer concentration, cyclical end-customer demand, and potential macroeconomic headwinds. While Jabil's current valuation is high compared to its historical range, its discounted FY2 PEG ratio suggests potential for an attractive investment opportunity.
